name: create-cmp
description: The AI delivery harness for Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform: scaffolds a green-building app (Android + iOS) by conversational interview, then holds any AI coding agent (Claude Code) to a machine-enforced definition of correct — a spec-driven verify lane that refuses "done" without a committed evidence receipt, dependency-free conformance gates, in-project generation skills that extend the app right-by-construction, a Stop-hook enforcement layer, and an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots) for catching design-token drift. Also includes toolchain auto-bootstrap, a doctor that heals any KMP project, proven-green version-set upgrades, and a Maestro E2E test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).
